name: AI Agents Cloud Run
description: Production-ready AI agents built with Google Gemini and the Agent Development Kit (ADK), deployed as serverless HTTP endpoints on Google Cloud Run.

GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT.description: Your Google Cloud project ID where the Cloud Run service will be deployed.

GOOGLE_API_KEY.description: Gemini API key used by the AI agent for model inference. Obtain from https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey – never commit this value to version control.

GEMINI_MODEL.description: The Gemini model to use for inference (e.g. gemini-1.5-pro, gemini-1.5-flash).

CLOUD_RUN_SERVICE_NAME.description: Name of the Cloud Run service.

CLOUD_RUN_REGION.description: Google Cloud region where the service will be hosted (e.g. us-central1, europe-west1).

PORT.description: Port the HTTP server listens on. Cloud Run injects this automatically.

DEBUG.description: Enable debug mode. Set to 'true' only in non-production environments.

LOG_LEVEL.description: Application log level (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR).

AGENT_TIMEOUT.description: Maximum time in seconds allowed for a single agent request.

MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE.description: Rate limit – maximum number of requests per minute per instance.

requiredServices.description: Google Cloud Run – hosts the serverless AI agent endpoint.
Google Cloud Build – builds and pushes the container image.
Artifact Registry – stores the container image.
Identity and Access Management – manages service account permissions.

iamRoles.description: Allows unauthenticated HTTP invocations of the Cloud Run service.
Grants the service account access to Vertex AI / Gemini APIs.

postdeploy: echo 'Deployment complete. Verify your service is running:'
echo 'Test your AI agent endpoint with:'
